description: 32. Retrieve the attribute of a group
examples:
Command Example
!tc-get-group-attributes group_id=4579650 group_type=events
Context Example
{
"TC.Group.Attribute": [
{
"AttributeID": 20279371,
"DateAdded": "2019-09-18T10:13:06Z",
name: tc-get-group-attributes

outputs.description: Date The date on which the group was added. TC.Group.Attribute.Displayed
outputs.name: TC.Group.Attribute.DateAdded

outputs.description: Whether the attribute is displayed on the UI. TC.Group.Attribute.AttributeID The ID of the attribute.
outputs.name: Boolean

outputs.description: Date The date on which the attribute was last modified. TC.Group.Attribute.Type
outputs.name: TC.Group.Attribute.LastModified

outputs.description: The type of the attribute. TC.Group.Attribute.Value The value of the attribute.
outputs.name: String
